meta.title: Site49 — Professional websites from €49/month
meta.description: Site49 builds and manages your professional website for one simple monthly fee, starting at €49/month. Design, hosting, maintenance and support included.

hero.titlePrefix: The professional website your business deserves,
hero.subtitle: Design, hosting, maintenance and technical support, all included in one simple monthly fee. No big upfront investment, no surprises on your bill.

services.title: Two services, one goal: growing your business
services.subtitle: Start with a professional website and grow into smarter business management whenever you're ready.

sites.title: Website Creation
sites.description: Business websites, online stores and landing pages built to turn visitors into customers, all included in one affordable monthly fee.

dashboards.title: Custom Dashboards
dashboards.description: Management dashboards tailored to your business, so you can track sales, processes or customers in one place, in real time, on any device.
features: Direct integration with your Site49 website
dashboards.note: Available as an add-on to any website plan, or included with the Enterprise plan.

pricing.title: A plan for every stage of your business
pricing.subtitle: No hidden costs. Cancel anytime, no penalties.
pricing.addonNote: Available as an optional add-on from €39/month on any plan — already included with the Enterprise plan.

basic.name: Basic
basic.description: Perfect for starting your professional online presence.

pro.name: Professional
pro.description: For businesses ready to sell and grow online.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: A complete solution with dedicated management.

howItWorks.title: From first conversation to launch, without the hassle
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, transparent process designed to save you time.

steps.title: Initial conversation
steps.description: We get to know your business, your goals and what your website needs to succeed.

steps.title: Design and content
steps.description: We build the custom design and put the content together with you, with revisions included until it's just right.

steps.title: Launch
steps.description: Your website goes live, optimized, fast and ready to convert visitors into customers.

steps.title: Ongoing support
steps.description: We keep monitoring, updating and optimizing your website every month, at no extra cost.

portfolio.title: Websites built to inspire trust
portfolio.subtitle: A few examples of the kind of work we create for our clients.

testimonials.title: Our clients recommend us
testimonials.subtitle: What people who've trusted their business to Site49 have to say.

items.name: Marta Oliveira
items.text: Our website was live in two weeks and we were already getting bookings through it. The monthly support gives us a peace of mind we never had with our previous agency.

items.name: Ricardo Almeida
items.text: Our online store exceeded expectations. The monthly fee is fair, and we never worry about hosting, security or updates anymore.

items.name: Sofia Baptista
items.text: The custom dashboard changed the way we track our clients. Everything in one panel, simple and clear.

items.name: Tiago Ferreira
items.role: Chef and owner, O Pátio Restaurant
items.text: With zero tech experience, the Site49 team handled everything. Our website is now the restaurant's calling card.

faq.title: Still have questions?
faq.subtitle: We've gathered the questions our clients ask us most.

items.question: Is there a long-term contract?
items.answer: No. We work on a monthly basis with no mandatory commitment. You can cancel anytime, with no penalties.

items.question: How long does it take to launch my website?
items.answer: On average, 2 to 4 weeks, depending on project complexity and how quickly content and feedback are shared.

items.question: Who writes the content for my website?
items.answer: Our team helps structure and write the copy together with you, based on your business information. You can also provide your own content if you prefer.

items.question: What happens if I want to cancel?
items.answer: You can cancel anytime, with no penalties. We provide your website files so the transition is simple.

items.question: Can I change plans later?
items.answer: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time, depending on your business needs.

items.question: Are the domain and hosting included?
items.answer: Yes, domain and hosting are included in every plan, with no extra costs for you to manage.

contact.title: Let's build your professional website
contact.subtitle: Fill in the form and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
